name: Corn Bread Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and measure it. Then sift salt, baking soda, baking powder, and sugar.
2. Combine eggs, sour milk, and melted shortening in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and beat thoroughly until well combined.
4. Fill corn-stick pans 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 20-25 minutes.
12 servings.
